(@st DATETIME, @ChannelID SMALLINT, @tempChannelID SMALLINT, @SiteID TINYINT, @TranMsgIDs TransMsgIDTableType READONLY)        INSERT INTO #work (TBAccountNo, Seqno, ServerID, ReplyTime, ChannelID, SentTime, Respms, TransMsgID)        SELECT             a.TBAccountNo,             a.Seqno,             a.ServerID,             a.TransTime,             a.ChannelID,             b.TransTime,             DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, b.TransTime, a.TransTime),            a.TransMsgID        FROM [logtrans_8] AS a         INNER JOIN @TranMsgIDs AS t ON a.TransMsgID = t.TransMsgID        INNER JOIN [logtrans_8] AS b             ON a.TBAccountNo = b.TBAccountNo             AND a.Seqno = b.Seqno             AND a.ServerID = b.ServerID             AND a.ChannelID = b.ChannelID            AND b.TransMsgID = a.TransMsgID - 1        WHERE a.TransTime >= b.TransTime             AND b.TransTime >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -30, @st)            AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, b.TransTime, a.TransTime) < 60             AND a.ServerType IN (SELECT SiteID FROM [dbo].[sr_get_site_id_list](@tempChannelID, @SiteID))             AND b.ServerType IN (SELECT SiteID FROM [dbo].[sr_get_site_id_list](@tempChannelID, @SiteID))

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_start_up(@error_codeintoutput)ASDECLARE @last_activity_idbigint,@prev_day_activity_idbigint,@bizdateintSET NOCOUNT ONBEGIN TRYSELECT @error_code = 0-- DO NOT use SELECT MAX(activity_id) FROM dbo.activities_vw directly,-- as the view used UNION (NOT UNION ALL), which led to poor performance -- for MAX(activity_id) aggregation functionSELECT @bizdate = ISNULL(MAX(bizdate), 0) FROM dbo.business_day WITH (SNAPSHOT) WHERE eod_time IS NOT NULL-- Get last activity IDSELECT @last_activity_id = MAX(max_activity_id)FROM (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(activity_id), 0) max_activity_idFROM dbo.activities WITH (SNAPSHOT)UNION ALLSELECT ISNULL(MAX(activity_id), 0) max_activity_idFROM dbo.previous_day_activities) a-- Get last previous day activtiy IDSELECT @prev_day_activity_id = MAX(max_activity_id)FROM (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(activity_id), 0) max_activity_idFROM dbo.activities WITH (SNAPSHOT)WHERE activity_bizdate <= @bizdateUNION ALLSELECT ISNULL(MAX(activity_id), 0) max_activity_idFROM dbo.previous_day_activities) a-- Return ResultSELECT @last_activity_id AS last_activity_id, @prev_day_activity_id AS prev_day_activity_idEND TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

(@P0 int,@P1 bigint,@P2 datetime2)select top (@P0) av1_0.activity_id,av1_0.account_no,av1_0.account_trxn_no,av1_0.activity_bizdate,av1_0.activity_code,av1_0.activity_time,av1_0.bet_category,av1_0.centre_no,av1_0.child_ticket_id,av1_0.customer_session_id,av1_0.dest_system_id,av1_0.error_text,av1_0.pocket_type,av1_0.is_prelog,av1_0.is_rcv,av1_0.result_binary,av1_0.result_code,av1_0.result_text,av1_0.source_activity_id,av1_0.source_system_id,av1_0.terminal_id,av1_0.terminal_msn,av1_0.terminal_session_id,av1_0.ticket_id,av1_0.ticket_type,av1_0.is_timeout,av1_0.window_no from dbo.activities_vw av1_0 where av1_0.activity_id>=@P1 and av1_0.activity_time<@P2 order by av1_0.activity_id

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_activities_worm(@error_codeint        output,@error_msg                 varchar(500)    output,@last_activity_idbigint,@activity_size             int)ASDECLARE @rowcountint,@current_time_bf_30secdatetime2,@sysNumtinyintSET NOCOUNT ONBEGIN TRY SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL,@last_activity_id = ISNULL(@last_activity_id, 0), @activity_size = ISNULL(@activity_size, 0),@current_time_bf_30sec = DATEADD(ss, -30, dbo.udf_get_time())IF @activity_size <= 0BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001, @error_msg = 'Input Parameter Error.'RETURN @error_codeEND/*Parameter Sniffing may occur for WHERE activity_id >= @last_activity_id,         when 1st time sp compilation happened just after EOD, when dbo.activities has very small (or even none) amount of record.        If this happens, Table Scan will apply on dbo.activities (before the WHERE filtering),         which would cause the slow execution performance (>9s for TOP 5000)        Added Query Hint (FORCESEEK) and (OPTIMIZE FOR (@xxx UNKNOWN)) to eliminate the chance of Parameter Sniffing*/SELECT @sysNum = system_id FROM system_infoSET @sysNum = ISNULL(@sysNum, 0)SELECT TOP(@activity_size)a.activity_id, a.activity_bizdate, a.activity_time, a.activity_code,a.ticket_id, a.child_ticket_id, a.result_code, a.result_text, a.result_binary,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0 then CASE WHEN fai.fo_cross_type = 0 THENCASE WHEN fai.fo_error_text IS NULL THEN fas.ticket_betline ELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDWHEN ((@sysNum IN (20, 21) AND a.activity_code = 518) OR (@sysNum IN (1, 17, 18, 19) AND a.activity_code = 220)) --for sell enq betlineTHEN fam.attribute_value   ELSE  CASE WHEN  a.bet_category=7 and fa.activity_type=1 THEN fas.ticket_betlineWHEN  fai.fo_cross_type > 0 THEN CAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX)) --cross ticket betline, cross fo ticket bet_category = 0 WHEN  a.bet_category=7 THEN  ftb.ticket_betlineELSE NULL ENDENDAS ticket_betline, (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_partial ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPartialPaid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_cancel ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isCanceled,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_final ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPaidFinal ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftd.is_div_cal_done ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isDivCaled--divcal,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_claim ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isClaimed--error claim (fo stop pay),(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN (CASE WHEN ft.release_to_centre_no = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isReleased --release HO ticket to branch flag,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.is_ho_payout ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isHotPayment,0AS isSelReversed--sell reversed flag,0AS isKeyPaid-- key pad paid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.create_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS fo_bizday-- fo transaction day(meeting date) need to confirm further??,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.centre_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_centre_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selCen--selling center,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.window_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_window_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selWin--selling window,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.create_timeELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN CASE WHEN ft.parent_ticket_id IS NULL THEN ft.selling_time ELSE ft.create_time END ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selTime--sell time,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.total_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_totPayoutAmt--total payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.previous_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_prvPayoutAmt--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.generation_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_tktGenNum--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_time ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payTime--pay out time ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS paid_bizdate ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.pay_window_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payCen--pay out center,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.paid_system_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_paySys--paying system,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.sports_id ELSE NULL END) AS sportType,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_fixed_odds ELSE NULL END) AS isFixedOdds,@sysNum AS sysNum,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.ticket_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_ticket_id,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.content_verifier ELSE NULL END) AS verifier,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.child_ticket_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_child_ticket_id,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftc.content_verifier ELSE NULL END) AS childverifierFROM (SELECT  TOP(@activity_size) pa.activity_id, pa.activity_bizdate, pa.activity_time, pa.activity_code,pa.ticket_id, pa.child_ticket_id, pa.result_code, pa.result_text, pa.result_binary, pa.bet_categoryFROM dbo.previous_day_activities pa WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE pa.activity_id >= @last_activity_idORDER BY pa.activity_idUNION ALLSELECT  TOP(@activity_size) ca.activity_id, ca.activity_bizdate, ca.activity_time, ca.activity_code,ca.ticket_id, ca.child_ticket_id, ca.result_code, ca.result_text, ca.result_binary, ca.bet_categoryFROM dbo.fo_activities_infoUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_info WITH(NOLOCK)) a1   GROUP BY fo_activity_id, dbo.previous_day_fo_activities  WITH(NOLOCK)) a2  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type) fa ON fa.fo_activity_id=fai.fo_activity_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_sell_vw fas ON fai.fo_activity_id=fas.fo_activity_id   --1 sellLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline FROM dbo.fo_activities_sellUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_sell  WITH(NOLOCK)) a3  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline)  fas ON fai.fo_activity_id=fas.fo_activity_id   --1 sell--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc ON fai.fo_activity_id=fasc.fo_activity_id and fa.activity_type=1   --1 sellLEFT JOIN ( SELECT (@P0 int,@P1 bigint,@P2 datetime2)select top (@P0) av1_0.activity_id,av1_0.account_no,av1_0.account_trxn_no,av1_0.activity_bizdate,av1_0.activity_code,av1_0.activity_time,av1_0.bet_category,av1_0.centre_no,av1_0.child_ticket_id,av1_0.customer_session_id,av1_0.dest_system_id,av1_0.error_text,av1_0.pocket_type,av1_0.is_prelog,av1_0.is_rcv,av1_0.result_binary,av1_0.result_code,av1_0.result_text,av1_0.source_activity_id,av1_0.source_system_id,av1_0.terminal_id,av1_0.terminal_msn,av1_0.terminal_session_id,av1_0.ticket_id,av1_0.ticket_type,av1_0.is_timeout,av1_0.window_no from dbo.activities_vw av1_0 where av1_0.activity_id>=@P1 and av1_0.activity_time<@P2 order by av1_0.activity_id

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_activities_worm(@error_codeint        output,@error_msg                 varchar(500)    output,@last_activity_idbigint,@activity_size             int)ASDECLARE @rowcountint,@current_time_bf_30secdatetime2,@sysNumtinyintSET NOCOUNT ONBEGIN TRY SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL,@last_activity_id = ISNULL(@last_activity_id, 0), @activity_size = ISNULL(@activity_size, 0),@current_time_bf_30sec = DATEADD(ss, -30, dbo.udf_get_time())IF @activity_size <= 0BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001, @error_msg = 'Input Parameter Error.'RETURN @error_codeEND/*Parameter Sniffing may occur for WHERE activity_id >= @last_activity_id,         when 1st time sp compilation happened just after EOD, when dbo.activities has very small (or even none) amount of record.        If this happens, Table Scan will apply on dbo.activities (before the WHERE filtering),         which would cause the slow execution performance (>9s for TOP 5000)        Added Query Hint (FORCESEEK) and (OPTIMIZE FOR (@xxx UNKNOWN)) to eliminate the chance of Parameter Sniffing*/SELECT @sysNum = system_id FROM system_infoSET @sysNum = ISNULL(@sysNum, 0)SELECT TOP(@activity_size)a.activity_id, a.activity_bizdate, a.activity_time, a.activity_code,a.ticket_id, a.child_ticket_id, a.result_code, a.result_text, a.result_binary,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0 then CASE WHEN fai.fo_cross_type = 0 THENCASE WHEN fai.fo_error_text IS NULL THEN fas.ticket_betline ELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDWHEN ((@sysNum IN (20, 21) AND a.activity_code = 518) OR (@sysNum IN (1, 17, 18, 19) AND a.activity_code = 220)) --for sell enq betlineTHEN fam.attribute_value   ELSE  CASE WHEN  a.bet_category=7 and fa.activity_type=1 THEN fas.ticket_betlineWHEN  fai.fo_cross_type > 0 THEN CAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX)) --cross ticket betline, cross fo ticket bet_category = 0 WHEN  a.bet_category=7 THEN  ftb.ticket_betlineELSE NULL ENDENDAS ticket_betline, (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_partial ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPartialPaid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_cancel ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isCanceled,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_final ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPaidFinal ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftd.is_div_cal_done ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isDivCaled--divcal,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_claim ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isClaimed--error claim (fo stop pay),(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN (CASE WHEN ft.release_to_centre_no = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isReleased --release HO ticket to branch flag,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.is_ho_payout ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isHotPayment,0AS isSelReversed--sell reversed flag,0AS isKeyPaid-- key pad paid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.create_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS fo_bizday-- fo transaction day(meeting date) need to confirm further??,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.centre_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_centre_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selCen--selling center,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.window_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_window_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selWin--selling window,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.create_timeELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN CASE WHEN ft.parent_ticket_id IS NULL THEN ft.selling_time ELSE ft.create_time END ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selTime--sell time,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.total_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_totPayoutAmt--total payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.previous_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_prvPayoutAmt--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.generation_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_tktGenNum--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_time ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payTime--pay out time ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS paid_bizdate ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.pay_window_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payCen--pay out center,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.paid_system_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_paySys--paying system,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.sports_id ELSE NULL END) AS CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_start_up(@error_codeintoutput)ASDECLARE @last_activity_idbigint,@prev_day_activity_idbigint,@bizdateintSET NOCOUNT ONBEGIN TRYSELECT @error_code = 0-- DO NOT use SELECT MAX(activity_id) FROM dbo.activities_vw directly,-- as the view used UNION (NOT UNION ALL), which led to poor performance -- for MAX(activity_id) aggregation functionSELECT @bizdate = ISNULL(MAX(bizdate), 0) FROM dbo.business_day WITH (SNAPSHOT) WHERE eod_time IS NOT NULL-- Get last activity IDSELECT @last_activity_id = MAX(max_activity_id)FROM (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(activity_id), 0) max_activity_idFROM dbo.activities WITH (SNAPSHOT)UNION ALLSELECT ISNULL(MAX(activity_id), 0) max_activity_idFROM dbo.previous_day_activities) a-- Get last previous day activtiy IDSELECT @prev_day_activity_id = MAX(max_activity_id)FROM (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(activity_id), 0) max_activity_idFROM dbo.activities WITH (SNAPSHOT)WHERE activity_bizdate <= @bizdateUNION ALLSELECT ISNULL(MAX(activity_id), 0) max_activity_idFROM dbo.previous_day_activities) a-- Return ResultSELECT @last_activity_id AS last_activity_id, @prev_day_activity_id AS prev_day_activity_idEND TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

(@P0 int,@P1 bigint,@P2 datetime2)select top (@P0) av1_0.activity_id,av1_0.account_no,av1_0.account_trxn_no,av1_0.activity_bizdate,av1_0.activity_code,av1_0.activity_time,av1_0.bet_category,av1_0.centre_no,av1_0.child_ticket_id,av1_0.customer_session_id,av1_0.dest_system_id,av1_0.error_text,av1_0.pocket_type,av1_0.is_prelog,av1_0.is_rcv,av1_0.result_binary,av1_0.result_code,av1_0.result_text,av1_0.source_activity_id,av1_0.source_system_id,av1_0.terminal_id,av1_0.terminal_msn,av1_0.terminal_session_id,av1_0.ticket_id,av1_0.ticket_type,av1_0.is_timeout,av1_0.window_no from dbo.activities_vw av1_0 where av1_0.activity_id>=@P1 and av1_0.activity_time<@P2 order by av1_0.activity_id

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_activities_worm(@error_codeint        output,@error_msg                 varchar(500)    output,@last_activity_idbigint,@activity_size             int)ASDECLARE @rowcountint,@current_time_bf_30secdatetime2,@sysNumtinyintSET NOCOUNT ONBEGIN TRY SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL,@last_activity_id = ISNULL(@last_activity_id, 0), @activity_size = ISNULL(@activity_size, 0),@current_time_bf_30sec = DATEADD(ss, -30, dbo.udf_get_time())IF @activity_size <= 0BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001, @error_msg = 'Input Parameter Error.'RETURN @error_codeEND/*Parameter Sniffing may occur for WHERE activity_id >= @last_activity_id,         when 1st time sp compilation happened just after EOD, when dbo.activities has very small (or even none) amount of record.        If this happens, Table Scan will apply on dbo.activities (before the WHERE filtering),         which would cause the slow execution performance (>9s for TOP 5000)        Added Query Hint (FORCESEEK) and (OPTIMIZE FOR (@xxx UNKNOWN)) to eliminate the chance of Parameter Sniffing*/SELECT @sysNum = system_id FROM system_infoSET @sysNum = ISNULL(@sysNum, 0)SELECT TOP(@activity_size)a.activity_id, a.activity_bizdate, a.activity_time, a.activity_code,a.ticket_id, a.child_ticket_id, a.result_code, a.result_text, a.result_binary,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0 then CASE WHEN fai.fo_cross_type = 0 THENCASE WHEN fai.fo_error_text IS NULL THEN fas.ticket_betline ELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDWHEN ((@sysNum IN (20, 21) AND a.activity_code = 518) OR (@sysNum IN (1, 17, 18, 19) AND a.activity_code = 220)) --for sell enq betlineTHEN fam.attribute_value   ELSE  CASE WHEN  a.bet_category=7 and fa.activity_type=1 THEN fas.ticket_betlineWHEN  fai.fo_cross_type > 0 THEN CAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX)) --cross ticket betline, cross fo ticket bet_category = 0 WHEN  a.bet_category=7 THEN  ftb.ticket_betlineELSE NULL ENDENDAS ticket_betline, (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_partial ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPartialPaid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_cancel ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isCanceled,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_final ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPaidFinal ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftd.is_div_cal_done ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isDivCaled--divcal,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_claim ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isClaimed--error claim (fo stop pay),(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN (CASE WHEN ft.release_to_centre_no = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isReleased --release HO ticket to branch flag,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.is_ho_payout ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isHotPayment,0AS isSelReversed--sell reversed flag,0AS isKeyPaid-- key pad paid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.create_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS fo_bizday-- fo transaction day(meeting date) need to confirm further??,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.centre_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_centre_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selCen--selling center,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.window_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_window_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selWin--selling window,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.create_timeELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN CASE WHEN ft.parent_ticket_id IS NULL THEN ft.selling_time ELSE ft.create_time END ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selTime--sell time,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.total_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_totPayoutAmt--total payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.previous_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_prvPayoutAmt--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.generation_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_tktGenNum--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_time ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payTime--pay out time ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS paid_bizdate ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.pay_window_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payCen--pay out center,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.paid_system_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_paySys--paying system,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.sports_id ELSE NULL END) AS sportType,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_fixed_odds ELSE NULL END) AS isFixedOdds,@sysNum AS sysNum,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.ticket_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_ticket_id,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.content_verifier ELSE NULL END) AS verifier,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.child_ticket_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_child_ticket_id,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftc.content_verifier ELSE NULL END) AS childverifierFROM (SELECT  TOP(@activity_size) pa.activity_id, pa.activity_bizdate, pa.activity_time, pa.activity_code,pa.ticket_id, pa.child_ticket_id, pa.result_code, pa.result_text, pa.result_binary, pa.bet_categoryFROM dbo.previous_day_activities pa WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE pa.activity_id >= @last_activity_idORDER BY pa.activity_idUNION ALLSELECT  TOP(@activity_size) ca.activity_id, ca.activity_bizdate, ca.activity_time, ca.activity_code,ca.ticket_id, ca.child_ticket_id, ca.result_code, ca.result_text, ca.result_binary, ca.bet_categoryFROM dbo.activities ca WITH (SNAPSHOT, FORCESEEK)WHERE ca.activity_id >= @last_activity_idORDER BY ca.activity_id) a--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_info_vw fai ON a.activity_id = fai.activity_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail FROM dbo.fo_activities_infoUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_info WITH(NOLOCK)) a1   GROUP BY fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail ) fai ON a.activity_id = fai.activity_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_vw fa ON fa.fo_activity_id=fai.fo_activity_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type FROM dbo.fo_activitiesUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities  WITH(NOLOCK)) a2  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type) fa ON fa.fo_activity_id=fai.fo_activity_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_sell_vw fas ON fai.fo_activity_id=fas.fo_activity_id   --1 sellLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline FROM dbo.fo_activities_sellUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_sell  WITH(NOLOCK)) a3  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline)  fas ON fai.fo_activity_id=fas.fo_activity_id   --1 sell--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc ON fai.fo_activity_id=fasc.fo_activity_id and fa.activity_type=1   --1 sellLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, centre_no, window_no, create_time  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, centre_no, window_no, create_time FROM dbo.fo_activities_source_cbtUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, centre_no, window_no, create_time FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_source_cbt  WITH(NOLOCK)) a4  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, centre_no, window_no, create_time)  fasc ON fai.fo_activity_id=fasc.fo_activity_id and  fa.activity_type IN (1, 2)   --1 sell 2 pay--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft ON ft.ticket_id = a.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, sports_id, is_fixed_odds, ticket_id, content_verifier, child_ticket_id, paid_fo_activity_id,parent_ticket_id, create_time  FROM (SELECT  is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, sports_id, is_fixed_odds, ticket_id, content_verifier, child_ticket_id, paid_fo_activity_id,parent_ticket_id, create_timeFROM dbo.fo_tickets UNION ALLSELECT  is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, sports_id, is_fixed_odds, ticket_id, content_verifier, child_ticket_id, paid_fo_activity_id,parent_ticket_id, create_timeFROM dbo.settled_fo_tickets  WITH(NOLOCK)    ) a5  GROUP BY is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, sports_id, is_fixed_odds, ticket_id, content_verifier, child_ticket_id, paid_fo_activity_id,parent_ticket_id, create_time) ft ON ft.ticket_id = a.ticket_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftc ON CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_activities_worm(@error_codeint        output,@error_msg                 varchar(500)    output,@last_activity_idbigint,@activity_size             int)ASDECLARE @rowcountint,@current_time_bf_30secdatetime2,@sysNumtinyintSET NOCOUNT ONBEGIN TRY SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL,@last_activity_id = ISNULL(@last_activity_id, 0), @activity_size = ISNULL(@activity_size, 0),@current_time_bf_30sec = DATEADD(ss, -30, dbo.udf_get_time())IF @activity_size <= 0BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001, @error_msg = 'Input Parameter Error.'RETURN @error_codeEND/*Parameter Sniffing may occur for WHERE activity_id >= @last_activity_id,         when 1st time sp compilation happened just after EOD, when dbo.activities has very small (or even none) amount of record.        If this happens, Table Scan will apply on dbo.activities (before the WHERE filtering),         which would cause the slow execution performance (>9s for TOP 5000)        Added Query Hint (FORCESEEK) and (OPTIMIZE FOR (@xxx UNKNOWN)) to eliminate the chance of Parameter Sniffing*/SELECT @sysNum = system_id FROM system_infoSET @sysNum = ISNULL(@sysNum, 0)SELECT TOP(@activity_size)a.activity_id, a.activity_bizdate, a.activity_time, a.activity_code,a.ticket_id, a.child_ticket_id, a.result_code, a.result_text, a.result_binary,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0 then CASE WHEN fai.fo_cross_type = 0 THENCASE WHEN fai.fo_error_text IS NULL THEN fas.ticket_betline ELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDWHEN ((@sysNum IN (20, 21) AND a.activity_code = 518) OR (@sysNum IN (1, 17, 18, 19) AND a.activity_code = 220)) --for sell enq betlineTHEN fam.attribute_value   ELSE  CASE WHEN  a.bet_category=7 and fa.activity_type=1 THEN fas.ticket_betlineWHEN  fai.fo_cross_type > 0 THEN CAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX)) --cross ticket betline, cross fo ticket bet_category = 0 WHEN  a.bet_category=7 THEN  ftb.ticket_betlineELSE NULL ENDENDAS ticket_betline, (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_partial ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPartialPaid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_cancel ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isCanceled,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_final ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPaidFinal ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftd.is_div_cal_done ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isDivCaled--divcal,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_claim ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isClaimed--error claim (fo stop pay),(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN (CASE WHEN ft.release_to_centre_no = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isReleased --release HO ticket to branch flag,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.is_ho_payout ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isHotPayment,0AS isSelReversed--sell reversed flag,0AS isKeyPaid-- key pad paid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.create_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS fo_bizday-- fo transaction day(meeting date) need to confirm further??,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.centre_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_centre_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selCen--selling center,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.window_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_window_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selWin--selling window,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.create_timeELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN CASE WHEN ft.parent_ticket_id IS NULL THEN ft.selling_time ELSE ft.create_time END ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selTime--sell time,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.total_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_totPayoutAmt--total payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.previous_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_prvPayoutAmt--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.generation_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_tktGenNum--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_time ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payTime--pay out time ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS paid_bizdate ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.pay_window_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payCen--pay out center,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.paid_system_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_paySys--paying system,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.sports_id ELSE NULL END) AS sportType,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_fixed_odds ELSE NULL END) AS isFixedOdds,@sysNum AS sysNum,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.ticket_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_ticket_id,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.content_verifier ELSE NULL END) AS verifier,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.child_ticket_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_child_ticket_id,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftc.content_verifier ELSE NULL END) AS childverifierFROM (SELECT  TOP(@activity_size) pa.activity_id, pa.activity_bizdate, pa.activity_time, pa.activity_code,pa.ticket_id, pa.child_ticket_id, pa.result_code, pa.result_text, pa.result_binary, pa.bet_categoryFROM dbo.previous_day_activities pa WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE pa.activity_id >= @last_activity_idORDER BY pa.activity_idUNION ALLSELECT  TOP(@activity_size) ca.activity_id, ca.activity_bizdate, ca.activity_time, ca.activity_code,ca.ticket_id, ca.child_ticket_id, ca.result_code, ca.result_text, ca.result_binary, ca.bet_categoryFROM dbo.activities ca WITH (SNAPSHOT, FORCESEEK)WHERE ca.activity_id >= @last_activity_idORDER BY ca.activity_id) a--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_info_vw fai ON a.activity_id = fai.activity_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail FROM dbo.fo_activities_infoUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_info WITH(NOLOCK)) a1   GROUP BY fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail ) fai ON a.activity_id = fai.activity_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_vw fa ON fa.fo_activity_id=fai.fo_activity_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type FROM dbo.fo_activitiesUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities  WITH(NOLOCK)) a2  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type) fa ON fa.fo_activity_id=fai.fo_activity_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_sell_vw fas ON fai.fo_activity_id=fas.fo_activity_id   --1 sellLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline FROM dbo.fo_activities_sellUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_sell  WITH(NOLOCK)) a3  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline)  fas ON fai.fo_activity_id=fas.fo_activity_id   --1 sell--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc ON fai.fo_activity_id=fasc.fo_activity_id and fa.activity_type=1   --1 sellLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fa.activity_type IN (1, 2)   --1 sell 2 pay--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft ON ft.ticket_id = a.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, GROUP BY is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, (@P0 int,@P1 bigint,@P2 datetime2)select top (@P0) av1_0.activity_id,av1_0.account_no,av1_0.account_trxn_no,av1_0.activity_bizdate,av1_0.activity_code,av1_0.activity_time,av1_0.bet_category,av1_0.centre_no,av1_0.child_ticket_id,av1_0.customer_session_id,av1_0.dest_system_id,av1_0.error_text,av1_0.pocket_type,av1_0.is_prelog,av1_0.is_rcv,av1_0.result_binary,av1_0.result_code,av1_0.result_text,av1_0.source_activity_id,av1_0.source_system_id,av1_0.terminal_id,av1_0.terminal_msn,av1_0.terminal_session_id,av1_0.ticket_id,av1_0.ticket_type,av1_0.is_timeout,av1_0.window_no from dbo.activities_vw av1_0 where av1_0.activity_id>=@P1 and av1_0.activity_time<@P2 order by av1_0.activity_id

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_activities_worm(@error_codeint        output,@error_msg                 varchar(500)    output,@last_activity_idbigint,@activity_size             int)ASDECLARE @rowcountint,@current_time_bf_30secdatetime2,@sysNumtinyintSET NOCOUNT ONBEGIN TRY SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL,@last_activity_id = ISNULL(@last_activity_id, 0), @activity_size = ISNULL(@activity_size, 0),@current_time_bf_30sec = DATEADD(ss, -30, dbo.udf_get_time())IF @activity_size <= 0BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001, @error_msg = 'Input Parameter Error.'RETURN @error_codeEND/*Parameter Sniffing may occur for WHERE activity_id >= @last_activity_id,         when 1st time sp compilation happened just after EOD, when dbo.activities has very small (or even none) amount of record.        If this happens, Table Scan will apply on dbo.activities (before the WHERE filtering),         which would cause the slow execution performance (>9s for TOP 5000)        Added Query Hint (FORCESEEK) and (OPTIMIZE FOR (@xxx UNKNOWN)) to eliminate the chance of Parameter Sniffing*/SELECT @sysNum = system_id FROM system_infoSET @sysNum = ISNULL(@sysNum, 0)SELECT TOP(@activity_size)a.activity_id, a.activity_bizdate, a.activity_time, a.activity_code,a.ticket_id, a.child_ticket_id, a.result_code, a.result_text, a.result_binary,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0 then CASE WHEN fai.fo_cross_type = 0 THENCASE WHEN fai.fo_error_text IS NULL THEN fas.ticket_betline ELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDWHEN ((@sysNum IN (20, 21) AND a.activity_code = 518) OR (@sysNum IN (1, 17, 18, 19) AND a.activity_code = 220)) --for sell enq betlineTHEN fam.attribute_value   ELSE  CASE WHEN  a.bet_category=7 and fa.activity_type=1 THEN fas.ticket_betlineWHEN  fai.fo_cross_type > 0 THEN CAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX)) --cross ticket betline, cross fo ticket bet_category = 0 WHEN  a.bet_category=7 THEN CREATE PROCEDURE usp_get_activities_worm(@error_codeint        output,@error_msg                 varchar(500)    output,@last_activity_idbigint,@activity_size             int)ASDECLARE @rowcountint,@current_time_bf_30secdatetime2,@sysNumtinyintSET NOCOUNT ONBEGIN TRY SELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL,@last_activity_id = ISNULL(@last_activity_id, 0), @activity_size = ISNULL(@activity_size, 0),@current_time_bf_30sec = DATEADD(ss, -30, dbo.udf_get_time())IF @activity_size <= 0BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001, @error_msg = 'Input Parameter Error.'RETURN @error_codeEND/*Parameter Sniffing may occur for WHERE activity_id >= @last_activity_id,         when 1st time sp compilation happened just after EOD, when dbo.activities has very small (or even none) amount of record.        If this happens, Table Scan will apply on dbo.activities (before the WHERE filtering),         which would cause the slow execution performance (>9s for TOP 5000)        Added Query Hint (FORCESEEK) and (OPTIMIZE FOR (@xxx UNKNOWN)) to eliminate the chance of Parameter Sniffing*/SELECT @sysNum = system_id FROM system_infoSET @sysNum = ISNULL(@sysNum, 0)SELECT TOP(@activity_size)a.activity_id, a.activity_bizdate, a.activity_time, a.activity_code,a.ticket_id, a.child_ticket_id, a.result_code, a.result_text, a.result_binary,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0 then CASE WHEN fai.fo_cross_type = 0 THENCASE WHEN fai.fo_error_text IS NULL THEN fas.ticket_betline ELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDELSECAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX))ENDWHEN ((@sysNum IN (20, 21) AND a.activity_code = 518) OR (@sysNum IN (1, 17, 18, 19) AND a.activity_code = 220)) --for sell enq betlineTHEN fam.attribute_value   ELSE  CASE WHEN  a.bet_category=7 and fa.activity_type=1 THEN fas.ticket_betlineWHEN  fai.fo_cross_type > 0 THEN CAST(fai.fo_activity_detail AS VARCHAR(MAX)) --cross ticket betline, cross fo ticket bet_category = 0 WHEN  a.bet_category=7 THEN  ftb.ticket_betlineELSE NULL ENDENDAS ticket_betline, (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_partial ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPartialPaid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_cancel ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isCanceled,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_paid_final ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isPaidFinal ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftd.is_div_cal_done ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isDivCaled--divcal,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_claim ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isClaimed--error claim (fo stop pay),(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN (CASE WHEN ft.release_to_centre_no = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isReleased --release HO ticket to branch flag,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.is_ho_payout ELSE NULL END) AS fo_isHotPayment,0AS isSelReversed--sell reversed flag,0AS isKeyPaid-- key pad paid,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.create_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS fo_bizday-- fo transaction day(meeting date) need to confirm further??,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.centre_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_centre_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selCen--selling center,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.window_noELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.selling_window_no ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selWin--selling window,CASE WHEN fa.result_code<>0  OR fas.offer_type = 2 then fasc.create_timeELSE (CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN CASE WHEN ft.parent_ticket_id IS NULL THEN ft.selling_time ELSE ft.create_time END ELSE NULL END) END AS fo_selTime--sell time,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.total_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_totPayoutAmt--total payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.previous_payout_amt ELSE NULL END) AS fo_prvPayoutAmt--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.generation_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_tktGenNum--previous payout in cents,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_time ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payTime--pay out time ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.paid_bizdate ELSE NULL END) AS paid_bizdate ,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fts.pay_window_no ELSE NULL END) AS fo_payCen--pay out center,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN fapf.paid_system_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_paySys--paying system,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.sports_id ELSE NULL END) AS sportType,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.is_fixed_odds ELSE NULL END) AS isFixedOdds,@sysNum AS sysNum,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.ticket_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_ticket_id,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.content_verifier ELSE NULL END) AS verifier,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ft.child_ticket_id ELSE NULL END) AS fo_child_ticket_id,(CASE WHEN a.bet_category = 7 THEN ftc.content_verifier ELSE NULL END) AS childverifierFROM (SELECT  TOP(@activity_size) pa.activity_id, pa.activity_bizdate, pa.activity_time, pa.activity_code,pa.ticket_id, pa.child_ticket_id, pa.result_code, pa.result_text, pa.result_binary, pa.bet_categoryFROM dbo.previous_day_activities pa WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE pa.activity_id >= @last_activity_idORDER BY pa.activity_idUNION ALLSELECT  TOP(@activity_size) ca.activity_id, ca.activity_bizdate, ca.activity_time, ca.activity_code,ca.ticket_id, ca.child_ticket_id, ca.result_code, ca.result_text, ca.result_binary, ca.bet_categoryFROM dbo.activities ca WITH (SNAPSHOT, FORCESEEK)WHERE ca.activity_id >= @last_activity_idORDER BY ca.activity_id) a--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_info_vw fai ON a.activity_id = fai.activity_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail FROM dbo.fo_activities_infoUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_info WITH(NOLOCK)) a1   GROUP BY fo_activity_id, activity_id, fo_cross_type, fo_error_text, fo_activity_detail ) fai ON a.activity_id = fai.activity_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_vw fa ON fa.fo_activity_id=fai.fo_activity_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type FROM dbo.fo_activitiesUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities  WITH(NOLOCK)) a2  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, result_code, activity_type) fa ON fa.fo_activity_id=fai.fo_activity_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_sell_vw fas ON fai.fo_activity_id=fas.fo_activity_id   --1 sellLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline FROM dbo.fo_activities_sellUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_sell  WITH(NOLOCK)) a3  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, offer_type, ticket_betline)  fas ON fai.fo_activity_id=fas.fo_activity_id   --1 sell--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc ON fai.fo_activity_id=fasc.fo_activity_id and fa.activity_type=1   --1 sellLEFT JOIN ( SELECT fo_activity_id, centre_no, window_no, create_time  FROM (SELECT fo_activity_id, centre_no, window_no, create_time FROM dbo.fo_activities_source_cbtUNION ALLSELECT fo_activity_id, centre_no, window_no, create_time FROM dbo.previous_day_fo_activities_source_cbt  WITH(NOLOCK)) a4  GROUP BY fo_activity_id, centre_no, window_no, create_time)  fasc ON fai.fo_activity_id=fasc.fo_activity_id and  fa.activity_type IN (1, 2)   --1 sell 2 pay--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ft ON ft.ticket_id = a.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, sports_id, is_fixed_odds, ticket_id, content_verifier, child_ticket_id, paid_fo_activity_id,parent_ticket_id, create_time  FROM (SELECT  is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, sports_id, is_fixed_odds, ticket_id, content_verifier, child_ticket_id, paid_fo_activity_id,parent_ticket_id, create_timeFROM dbo.fo_tickets UNION ALLSELECT  is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, sports_id, is_fixed_odds, ticket_id, content_verifier, child_ticket_id, paid_fo_activity_id,parent_ticket_id, create_timeFROM dbo.settled_fo_tickets  WITH(NOLOCK)    ) a5  GROUP BY is_paid_partial, is_cancel, is_paid_final, is_claim, release_to_centre_no, create_bizdate, selling_time, total_payout_amt, previous_payout_amt, generation_no, paid_time, paid_bizdate, sports_id, is_fixed_odds, ticket_id, content_verifier, child_ticket_id, paid_fo_activity_id,parent_ticket_id, create_time) ft ON ft.ticket_id = a.ticket_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftc ON ft.child_ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( SELECT ticket_id, content_verifier  FROM (SELECT ticket_id, content_verifier FROM dbo.fo_tickets UNION ALLSELECT ticket_id, content_verifier FROM dbo.settled_fo_tickets  WITH(NOLOCK)) a6  GROUP BY ticket_id, content_verifier) ftc ON ft.child_ticket_id = ftc.ticket_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON fts.ticket_id = CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY   ,@now                  DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @i                       INT = 1          ,@error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT'          ,@bizdate                DATE          ,@system_id           TINYINT          ,@ticket_id            BIGINT          ,@pool_id              BIGINT          ,@line_id            SMALLINT          ,@combination_id     SMALLINT          ,@activity_id          BIGINT;    SELECT @bizdate = bizdate          ,@system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id    FROM   @data;    --    IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN        RETURN;    END;    -- for handling incoming divcal async case if any    IF NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND update_activity_id >= @activity_id    )    BEGIN        -- skip checking bizdate        DELETE dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_divcal_plc               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,pool_id               ,line_id               ,combination_id               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        SELECT @bizdate              ,@system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,pool_id              ,line_id              ,combination_id              ,@activity_id              ,@now              ,@activity_id              ,@now        FROM   @data;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY   ,@now                  DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @i                       INT = 1          ,@error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT'          ,@bizdate                DATE          ,@system_id           TINYINT          ,@ticket_id            BIGINT          ,@pool_id              BIGINT          ,@line_id            SMALLINT          ,@combination_id     SMALLINT          ,@activity_id          BIGINT;    SELECT @bizdate = bizdate          ,@system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id    FROM   @data;    --    IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN        RETURN;    END;    -- for handling incoming divcal async case if any    IF NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND update_activity_id >= @activity_id    )    BEGIN        -- skip checking bizdate        DELETE dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_divcal_plc               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,pool_id               ,line_id               ,combination_id               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        SELECT @bizdate              ,@system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,pool_id              ,line_id              ,combination_id              ,@activity_id              ,@now              ,@activity_id              ,@now        FROM   @data;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_divcal(    @activity        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@divcal         dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@divcal_plc dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg             NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay        DECLARE                @system_id                TINYINT              ,@ticket_id                 BIGINT -- TODO: for checking parent ticket id              ,@divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;        SELECT @system_id = system_id              ,@ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   @divcal;        SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   dbo.ticket_payout        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;        --        -- set parent @ticket_id        INSERT INTO @divcal_new               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,child_ticket_id               ,divcal_amount               ,selective_refund_amount               ,is_divcal_done               ,activity_id)        SELECT bizdate              ,system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,ticket_id              ,divcal_amount              ,selective_refund_amount              ,is_divcal_done              ,activity_id        FROM   @divcal;        --        -- divcal        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal              @divcal_new,             @system_datetime;        --        -- divcal plc for selective refund        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc              @divcal_plc,             @system_datetime;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

   -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0;        SELECT @system_id = system_id              ,@ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   @divcal;        SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   dbo.ticket_payout        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay        DECLARE                @system_id                TINYINT              ,@ticket_id                 BIGINT -- TODO: for checking parent ticket id              ,@divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;        SELECT @system_id = system_id              ,@ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   @divcal;        SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   dbo.ticket_payout        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id; CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

@tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

         BIGINT  ,@system_id                     TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id                BIGINT  ,@parent_sell_request_id         BIGINT  ,@log_bet_type                  TINYINT  ,@log_bet_category              TINYINT  ,@last_ticket_action            TINYINT  ,@ticket_id                      BIGINT  ,@counter_offer_id               BIGINT  ,@collation_sequence             BIGINT  ,@account_no                VARCHAR(16)  ,@account_category                  INT  ,@centre_no                         INT  ,@channel_type                  TINYINT  ,@window_no                    SMALLINT         TINYINT  ,@bet_intercept_reason          TINYINT  ,@bizdate                          DATE  ,@request_at                  DATETIME2  ,@sports_id                     TINYINT;--SELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_id  ,@parent_sell_request_id = parent_sell_request_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id  ,@counter_offer_id = counter_offer_id  ,@centre_no = centre_no  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@window_no = window_no  ,@is_on_course = is_on_course  ,@unit_bet = unit_bet_updated--unit_bet  ,@financial_index = ,@counter_offer_type = counter_offer_type  ,@collation_type = collation_type  ,@bet_intercept_reason = bet_intercept_reason  ,@collation_sequence = collation_sequence  ,@result_code = result_codeFROM   @activity;SELECT @account_no = account_no  ,@account_category = account_categoryFROM   @account;--SELECT @centre_no = centre_no--FROM   @location;---- Delete log_bet record for sell undo and ticket @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @sell_request_status = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3--WHERE  @sell_request_status = 9;SELECT @log_bet_category = 4WHERE  @sell_request_status = 7;SELECT @log_bet_category = 5WHERE  @sell_request_status = 6;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 3 -- counter offer   AND @sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED   AND (activity_id   ,system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,log_bet_type   ,log_bet_category   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,collation_sequence   ,account_no   ,account_category   ,channel_type   ,window_no   ,is_on_course   ,centre_no   ,unit_bet   ,financial_index   ,flag   ,remark   ,reject_code   ,reject_reason   ,activity_code   ,activity_type ,@collation_sequence   ,@account_no   ,@account_category   ,@channel_type   ,@window_no   ,@is_on_course   ,@centre_no   ,@unit_bet   ,@financial_index   ,@flag   ,@remark   ,@reject_code   ,@reject_reason   ,@activity_code   ,@activity_type   ,@message_type   ,@sell_request_status   ,@ticket_status   ,@counter_offer_type   ,@collation_type   ,@bet_intercept_reason   ,@checkpoint_id   ,@bizdate   ,@request_at   ,@now   ,@now);END;SET @i_log_bet_type+=1;END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY   ,@now                  DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @i                       INT = 1          ,@error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT'          ,@bizdate                DATE          ,@system_id           TINYINT          ,@ticket_id            BIGINT          ,@pool_id              BIGINT          ,@line_id            SMALLINT          ,@combination_id     SMALLINT          ,@activity_id          BIGINT;    SELECT @bizdate = bizdate          ,@system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id    FROM   @data;    --    IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN        RETURN;    END;    -- for handling incoming divcal async case if any    IF NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND update_activity_id >= @activity_id    )    BEGIN        -- skip checking bizdate        DELETE dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_divcal_plc               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,pool_id               ,line_id               ,combination_id               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        SELECT @bizdate              ,@system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,pool_id              ,line_id              ,combination_id              ,@activity_id              ,@now              ,@activity_id              ,@now        FROM   @data;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY   ,@now                  DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @i                       INT = 1          ,@error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT'          ,@bizdate                DATE          ,@system_id           TINYINT          ,@ticket_id            BIGINT          ,@pool_id              BIGINT          ,@line_id            SMALLINT          ,@combination_id     SMALLINT          ,@activity_id          BIGINT;    SELECT @bizdate = bizdate          ,@system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id    FROM   @data;    --    IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN        RETURN;    END;    -- for handling incoming divcal async case if any    IF NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND update_activity_id >= @activity_id    )    BEGIN        -- skip checking bizdate        DELETE dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_divcal_plc               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,pool_id               ,line_id               ,combination_id               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        SELECT @bizdate              ,@system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,pool_id              ,line_id              ,combination_id              ,@activity_id              ,@now              ,@activity_id              ,@now        FROM   @data;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_sell(-- activity@tvp_activity                        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                        dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                             dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY-- ticket_location   ,@location                             dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY-- account    ,@account                               dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY-- ticket info   ,@tvp_ticket                                dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_status                  dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_single          dbo.udt_ticket_bet_single READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_allup            dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@ticket_status     TINYINT = 2  ,@ticket_action     TINYINT = 1; -- sell ticketDECLARE    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_updater(@sell_request     dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg          dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@now                         DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0;DECLARE    @bizdate                DATE  ,@channel_type        TINYINT  ,@channel_device_type TINYINT  ,@channel_report_type TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT  ,@db_activity_id       BIGINT = 0  ,@db_exists               BIT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id      BIGINT;SELECT @bizdate = bizdate  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@channel_device_type = channel_device_type  ,@channel_report_type = channel_report_type  ,@activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_idFROM   @sell_request;IF @@rowcount = 0BEGINRETURN; -- sell_request record not found, skipEND;-- get db activity_idSELECT @db_activity_id = update_activity_id  ,@db_exists = 1FROM   dbo.sell_request WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE  @system_id = system_id AND @sell_request_id = sell_request_idORDER BY update_activity_id DESC;-- skip update if db record is newerIF @db_activity_id >= @activity_idBEGINRETURN;END;IF @db_exists = 1BEGINUPDATE dbsrSET    dbsr.parent_sell_request_id = sr.parent_sell_request_id,dbsr.ticket_id = sr.ticket_id,dbsr.unit_bet_updated = sr.unit_bet_updated,dbsr.investment_updated = sr.investment_updated,dbsr.tsn = sr.tsn,dbsr.rtsn = sr.rtsn,dbsr.bet_line = sr.bet_line,dbsr.update_at = @now,dbsr.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request dbsr WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @sell_request sr ON dbsr.system_id = sr.system_id AND dbsr.sell_request_id = sr.sell_request_id;UPDATE dbsrlSET    dbsrl.odds_counter_offered = srl.odds_counter_offered,dbsrl.update_at = @now,dbsrl.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request_leg dbsrl WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @leg srl ON dbsrl.system_id = srl.system_id AND dbsrl.sell_request_id = srl.sell_request_id AND dbsrl.pool_id = srl.pool_id AND dbsrl.line_id = srl.line_id AND dbsrl.combination_id = srl.combination_id;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.sell_request   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,odds_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_level   ,allup_formula   ,allup_type   ,bizdate   ,request_at   ,location_type   ,channel_type   ,channel_device_type   ,channel_report_type   ,centre_no   ,window_no   ,financial_index   ,num_bet   ,unit_bet   ,unit_bet_updated   ,investment   ,investment_updated   ,tsn   ,rtsn   ,bet_line   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,race_no   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,parent_sell_request_id  ,ticket_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,odds_type  ,is_allup  ,allup_level  ,allup_formula  ,allup_type  ,@bizdate  ,request_at  ,location_type  ,channel_type  ,channel_device_type  ,channel_report_type  ,centre_no  ,window_no  ,financial_index  ,num_bet  ,unit_bet  ,unit_bet_updated  ,investment  ,investment_updated  ,tsn  ,rtsn  ,bet_line  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,race_no  ,@now  ,activity_id  ,@now  ,activity_idFROM   @sell_request;INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_leg   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,bizdate   ,sports_id   ,leg_order   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,combination_order   ,is_inplay   ,odds   ,odds_counter_offered   ,ems_sequence   ,event_id   ,event_operation_status   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,dbo.udf_get_bizdate()  ,sports_id  ,leg_order  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,combination_order  ,is_inplay  ,odds  ,odds_counter_offered  ,ems_sequence  ,event_id  ,event_operation_status  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @leg;END;END;
