CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_location(    @location dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@now                DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @bizdate                DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_location           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,activity_id           ,process_location           ,centre_no           ,window_no           ,is_svt           ,is_on_course           ,esc_no           ,terminal_no           ,ngbt_bet_mode           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT a.system_id          ,a.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.activity_id          ,a.process_location          ,a.centre_no          ,a.window_no          ,a.is_svt          ,a.is_on_course          ,a.esc_no          ,a.terminal_no          ,a.ngbt_bet_mode          ,@now          ,a.activity_id          ,@now          ,a.activity_id    FROM   @location a           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_location srl WITH (FORCESEEK) ON srl.system_id = a.system_id AND srl.sell_request_id = a.sell_request_id    WHERE  a.sell_request_id > 0 AND srl.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_sell(-- activity@tvp_activity                        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                        dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                             dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY-- ticket_location   ,@location                             dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY-- account    ,@account                               dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY-- ticket info   ,@tvp_ticket                                dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_status                  dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_single          dbo.udt_ticket_bet_single READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_allup            dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@ticket_status     TINYINT = 2  ,@ticket_action     TINYINT = 1; -- sell ticketDECLARE    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update(    @tvp_ticket_status dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@count                   INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_id            TINYINT          ,@ticket_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_id           BIGINT          ,@activity_bizdate        DATE          ,@activity_at        DATETIME2          ,@ticket_status        TINYINT          ,@last_ticket_status   TINYINT          ,@sell_activity_id      BIGINT          ,@sell_bizdate            DATE          ,@sell_at            DATETIME2          ,@pay_activity_id       BIGINT          ,@pay_bizdate             DATE          ,@pay_at             DATETIME2          ,@cancel_activity_id    BIGINT          ,@cancel_bizdate          DATE          ,@cancel_at          DATETIME2          ,@is_reverse               BIT          ,@is_pay                   BIT          ,@is_cancel                BIT          ,@is_cancel_reverse        BIT          ,@last_ticket_action   TINYINT          ,@last_activity_id      BIGINT;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@activity_bizdate = activity_bizdate          ,@activity_at = activity_at          ,@ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    IF @@rowcount <> 1    BEGIN        SELECT @error_code = 50001              ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';        THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;    END;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history_mem           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND activity_id > @activity_id    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;    IF @@rowcount = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @ticket_status = @last_ticket_status;    END;    -- determine the sell_activity_id    IF @ticket_action = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @count = COUNT(*)        FROM   dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND ticket_action = 2;        IF @count = 0        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = @activity_id                  ,@sell_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                  ,@sell_at = @activity_at                  ,@is_reverse = 0;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 2        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4            BEGIN                SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                            ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 3 OR ticket_action = 4)                ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                -- Payout is the last one                IF @last_ticket_action = 3                BEGIN                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = @last_activity_id                          ,@pay_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                          ,@pay_at = @activity_at                          ,@is_pay = 1;                END;                    ELSE                BEGIN -- UNDO is the last one                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = NULL                          ,@pay_bizdate = NULL                          ,@pay_at = NULL                          ,@is_pay = 0;                END;            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6                BEGIN                    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                                ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 5 OR ticket_action = 6)                    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                    IF @last_ticket_action = 5                    BEGIN                        -- Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = @last_activity_id                              ,@cancel_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                              ,@cancel_at = @activity_at                              ,@is_cancel = 1                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 0;                    END;                        ELSE                    BEGIN                        -- UNDO Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = NULL                              ,@cancel_bizdate = NULL                              ,@cancel_at = NULL                              ,@is_cancel = 0                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 1;                    END;                END;            END;        END;    END;    IF @ticket_action = 1 OR @ticket_action = 2    BEGIN        UPDATE dbo.ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;--unsettled ticket status UPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4        BEGIN            UPDATE dbo.ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6            BEGIN                UPDATE dbo.ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;            END;        END;    END;END;

VARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @now         DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry          BIT = 0  ,@activity_id    BIGINT  ,@result_code       INT;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRYSELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@result_code = result_codeFROM   @tvp_activity;-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @now, @is_retry OUTPUT;--result_code>0, that mean this is a invalid es ticketIF @result_code IS NULL OR @result_code = 0BEGINIF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.cashout_ticket a   INNER JOIN @cashout_ticket b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = ,already_payout_amount   ,financial_indexs   ,request_cashout_amount   ,calculated_cashout_amount   ,cashout_datetime   ,cashout_bizdate   ,is_inplay   ,device_type   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT a.system_id  ,a.ticket_id  ,a.cashout_amount  ,a.already_payout_amount  ,a.financial_indexs  ,a.request_cashout_amount  ,a.calculated_cashout_amount  ,a.cashout_datetime  ,a.cashout_bizdate  ,a.is_inplay  ,a.device_type  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @cashout_ticket a;INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,cashout_amount   ,already_payout_amount   ,financial_indexs   ,request_cashout_amount   ,calculated_cashout_amount   ,cashout_datetime   ,cashout_bizdate   ,is_inplay   ,device_type   ,settle_status   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT a.system_id  ,a.ticket_id  ,a.cashout_amount  ,a.already_payout_amount  ,a.financial_indexs  ,a.request_cashout_amount  ,a.calculated_cashout_amount  ,a.cashout_datetime  ,a.cashout_bizdate  ,a.is_inplay  ,a.device_type  ,0  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @cashout_ticket a;END;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update(    @tvp_ticket_status dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@count                   INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_id            TINYINT          ,@ticket_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_id           BIGINT          ,@activity_bizdate        DATE          ,@activity_at        DATETIME2          ,@ticket_status        TINYINT          ,@last_ticket_status   TINYINT          ,@sell_activity_id      BIGINT          ,@sell_bizdate            DATE          ,@sell_at            DATETIME2          ,@pay_activity_id       BIGINT          ,@pay_bizdate             DATE          ,@pay_at             DATETIME2          ,@cancel_activity_id    BIGINT          ,@cancel_bizdate          DATE          ,@cancel_at          DATETIME2          ,@is_reverse               BIT          ,@is_pay                   BIT          ,@is_cancel                BIT          ,@is_cancel_reverse        BIT          ,@last_ticket_action   TINYINT          ,@last_activity_id      BIGINT;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@activity_bizdate = activity_bizdate          ,@activity_at = activity_at          ,@ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    IF @@rowcount <> 1    BEGIN        SELECT @error_code = 50001              ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';        THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;    END;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history_mem           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND activity_id > @activity_id    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;    IF @@rowcount = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @ticket_status = @last_ticket_status;    END;    -- determine the sell_activity_id    IF @ticket_action = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @count = COUNT(*)        FROM   dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND ticket_action = 2;        IF @count = 0        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = @activity_id                  ,@sell_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                  ,@sell_at = @activity_at                  ,@is_reverse = 0;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 2        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4            BEGIN                SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                            ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 3 OR ticket_action = 4)                ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                -- Payout is the last one                IF @last_ticket_action = 3                BEGIN                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = @last_activity_id                          ,@pay_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                          ,@pay_at = @activity_at                          ,@is_pay = 1;                END;                    ELSE                BEGIN -- UNDO is the last one                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = NULL                          ,@pay_bizdate = NULL                          ,@pay_at = NULL                          ,@is_pay = 0;                END;            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6                BEGIN                    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                                ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 5 OR ticket_action = 6)                    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                    IF @last_ticket_action = 5                    BEGIN                        -- Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = @last_activity_id                              ,@cancel_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                              ,@cancel_at = @activity_at                              ,@is_cancel = 1                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 0;                    END;                        ELSE                    BEGIN                        -- UNDO Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = NULL                              ,@cancel_bizdate = NULL                              ,@cancel_at = NULL                              ,@is_cancel = 0                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 1;                    END;                END;            END;        END;    END;    IF @ticket_action = 1 OR @ticket_action = 2    BEGIN        UPDATE dbo.ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;--unsettled ticket status UPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4        BEGIN            UPDATE dbo.ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6            BEGIN                UPDATE dbo.ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;            END;        END;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_sell(-- activity@tvp_activity                        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                        dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                             dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY-- ticket_location   ,@location                             dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY-- account    ,@account                               dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY-- ticket info   ,@tvp_ticket                                dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_status                  dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_single          dbo.udt_ticket_bet_single READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_allup            dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@ticket_status     TINYINT = 2  ,@ticket_action     TINYINT = 1; -- sell ticketDECLARE    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_sell(-- activity@tvp_activity                        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                        dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                             dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY-- ticket_location   ,@location                             dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY-- account    ,@account                               dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY-- ticket info   ,@tvp_ticket                                dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_status                  dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_single          dbo.udt_ticket_bet_single READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_allup            dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@ticket_status     TINYINT = 2  ,@ticket_action     TINYINT = 1; -- sell ticketDECLARE    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[unlock_user_task](    -- return code and message@return_code             INTOUTPUT,@return_msg              NVARCHAR(500)  OUTPUT,-- input parameters@user_idvarchar(max))AS BEGIN-- Set Default valuesSET @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = NULL;BEGIN TRYUPDATE [dbo].[task_assignment_log]SET [is_locked] = 0, locked_time = NULL, locked_by = NULLWHERE LOWER(locked_by) = LOWER(@user_id) AND task_id IN (SELECT task_idFROM [dbo].[task_log] WHERE is_cancelled = 0 ANDis_expired = 0 ANDis_completed = 0)END TRYBEGIN CATCH--retry error code(2601,2627,41301,41302,41305,41325,41839) in APP sideIF @return_code = 0BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()SET @return_msg  = SUBSTRING('ERROR in ' + ERROR_PROCEDURE() + ' line ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE()) + ': ' + ERROR_MESSAGE(), 1, 500)ENDEND CATCHEND;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[schedule_task_expiration_reminder](@operationOffsetBIGINT,-- return code and message@return_code             INTOUTPUT,@return_msg              NVARCHAR(500)  OUTPUT)AS BEGINSET @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = NULL;--DECLARE @offset int;SET @operationOffset = ISNULL(@operationOffset,-1)BEGIN TRYUPDATE [K2_Custom].[dbo].[task_log]SET is_expired = 1WHERE task_id IN (  -- Expired Tasks  SELECT task_id   FROM [K2_Custom].[dbo].[task_log] tl JOIN [K2_Custom].[dbo].[task_expirations] te   ON tl.template_id = te.task_template_id  WHERE is_cancelled = 0 AND is_completed = 0 AND is_expired = 0 AND is_cancelled = 0 AND is_failed = 0 ANDtask_expiration_enabled = 1 ANDDATEADD(MINUTE, te.task_expiration_time, tl.start_time) < DATEADD(SECOND, @operationOffset, GETDATE()))DECLARE @updated_task_id table(id BIGINT NOT NULL);WITH p1 AS (  SELECT task_id,task_reminder_time,reminder_level  FROM [K2_Custom].[dbo].[task_log] tl   JOIN [K2_Custom].[dbo].[task_reminders] tr ON tl.template_id = tr.task_template_id  WHERE is_cancelled = 0 AND is_completed = 0 AND is_expired = 0 AND is_cancelled = 0 AND is_failed = 0 ANDtask_reminder_enabled = 1),p2 AS (SELECT task_id, ISNULL(MAX(stage),0) AS to_be_approved_stage, MAX(start_time) AS start_timeFROM [dbo].[task_assignment_log] aWHERE start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NULLAND task_id IN (SELECT task_id FROM p1)GROUP BY task_id),p3 AS (SELECT p1.task_id,to_be_approved_stageFROM p1JOIN p2 ON p1.task_id=p2.task_idWHERE p1.reminder_level < to_be_approved_stage AND DATEADD(MINUTE, p1.task_reminder_time, p2.start_time) < DATEADD(SECOND, @operationOffset, GETDATE()))UPDATE [dbo].[task_log]SET [dbo].[task_log].reminder_level = to_be_approved_stage, [dbo].[task_log].is_reminded=1OUTPUT INSERTED.task_id INTO @updated_task_idFROM p3WHERE [dbo].[task_log].task_id = p3.task_idSELECT *,CASE WHEN [is_expired]=1 THEN 'Expired' WHEN [is_cancelled]=1 THEN 'Cancelled' -- WHEN [is_failed]=1 THEN 'Failed' WHEN [is_completed]=1 THEN 'Completed' WHEN [is_inprogress]=1 AND [t].[num_stages] > 1 THEN 'InProgress' ELSE 'New'END as [task_status]FROM [dbo].[task_log] [t]WHERE task_id IN (SELECT * FROM @updated_task_id)OPTION (RECOMPILE)END TRYBEGIN CATCH--retry error code(2601,2627,41301,41302,41305,41325,41839) in APP sideIF @return_code = 0BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()SET @return_msg  = SUBSTRING('ERROR in ' + ERROR_PROCEDURE() + ' line ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE()) + ': ' + ERROR_MESSAGE(), 1, 500)ENDEND CATCHEND;/****** Object:  StoredProcedure [dbo].[schedule_task_escalation]    Script Date: 10/18/2023 4:04:59 PM ******/SET ANSI_NULLS ON

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_log_bet_updater(@activity      dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request  dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@account         dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@ticket              dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@now                      DATETIME2   ,@checkpoint_id               BIGINT = 0)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code                  INT = 0  ,@error_message     NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@i_log_bet_type          TINYINT = 1  ,@is_insert_needed            BIT = 0  ,@is_reverse                  BIT  ,@is_cancel_reverse           BIT;DECLARE    @activity_id                    BIGINT  ,@system_id                     TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id                BIGINT  ,@parent_sell_request_id         BIGINT  ,@log_bet_type                  TINYINT  ,@log_bet_category              TINYINT  ,@last_ticket_action            TINYINT  ,@ticket_id                      BIGINT  ,@counter_offer_id               BIGINT  ,@collation_sequence             BIGINT  ,@account_no                VARCHAR(16)  ,@account_category                  INT  ,@centre_no                         INT  ,@channel_type                  TINYINT  ,@window_no                    SMALLINT  ,@is_on_course                      BIT  ,@result_code                       INT  ,@unit_bet               DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@financial_index               TINYINT  ,@flag                          TINYINT  ,@remark                   VARCHAR(250)  ,@reject_code                  SMALLINT  ,@reject_reason            VARCHAR(250)  ,@activity_code                 TINYINT  ,@activity_type                 TINYINT  ,@message_type                  TINYINT  ,@sell_request_status           TINYINT  ,@ticket_status                 TINYINT  ,@counter_offer_type            TINYINT  ,@collation_type                TINYINT  ,@bet_intercept_reason          TINYINT  ,@bizdate                          DATE  ,@request_at                  DATETIME2  ,@sports_id                     TINYINT;--SELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_id  ,@parent_sell_request_id = parent_sell_request_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id  ,@counter_offer_id = counter_offer_id  ,@centre_no = centre_no  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@window_no = window_no  ,@is_on_course = is_on_course  ,@unit_bet = unit_bet_updated--unit_bet  ,@financial_index = financial_index  ,@bizdate = bizdate  ,@request_at = request_at  ,@flag = flag  ,@remark = remark  ,@reject_code = reject_code  ,@reject_reason = reject_reason  ,@sports_id = sports_idFROM   @sell_request;SELECT @activity_code = activity_code  ,@activity_type = activity_type  ,@message_type = message_type  ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status  ,@ticket_status = ticket_status  ,@counter_offer_type = counter_offer_type  ,@collation_type = collation_type  ,@bet_intercept_reason = bet_intercept_reason  ,@collation_sequence = collation_sequence  ,@result_code = result_codeFROM   @activity;SELECT @account_no = account_no  ,@account_category = account_categoryFROM   @account;--SELECT @centre_no = centre_no--FROM   @location;---- Delete log_bet record for sell undo and ticket cancel undo caseSELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_idFROM   @ticket;--SELECT @is_reverse = is_reverse  ,@is_cancel_reverse = is_cancel_reverseFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_statusWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;IF @is_reverse = 1 -- Sell Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 1; -- AcceptEND;IF @is_cancel_reverse = 1 -- Ticket Cancel Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 2 AND log_bet_category = 6; -- Reject, CancelEND;---- check all possible bet_type for each sell_requestWHILE @i_log_bet_type < 4 -- 1 Accept, 2 Reject, 3 Counter OfferBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 0;SET @log_bet_category = 0;-- check @activity_statusIF @i_log_bet_type = 1 -- accept   AND @activity_code = 3 --COLLATION_REPLY   AND @ticket_status = 2 --SOLD   AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type <> 3) --REVERSE_CANCELBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;SET @log_bet_category = @counter_offer_type;--SELECT @unit_bet = unit_bet FROM  @ticket;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 2 -- reject   AND @result_code > 0 -- AP indicated reject   AND (@ticket_status <> 5 OR @ticket_status IS NULL) -- null: for request rejected by AP-- AND @checkpoint_id; > 0 -- from RM-- AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type = 0) --NULL,SELL-- AND @sell_request_status IN(5,6,7,9) -- TRADER_REJECTED,TRADER_TIMEOUT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT,SYSTEM_REJECTED-- @sell_request_status in (8) -- ABORTEDBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 2xx Customer / Trader / System / Customer Timeout / Trader Timeout--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @sell_request_status = 8; -- Customer?SELECT @log_bet_category = 3; -- defaultSELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @sell_request_status = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3--WHERE  @sell_request_status = 9;SELECT @log_bet_category = 4WHERE  @sell_request_status = 7;SELECT @log_bet_category = 5WHERE  @sell_request_status = 6;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 3 -- counter offer   AND @sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED   AND @counter_offer_type IN(2,3) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER,MANUAL_COUNTER_OFFERBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 3xx Trader / SystemMNL / SystemOdds--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @counter_offer_type = 3;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 2 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 7;-- 3xx System / Trader: after FR_4613 simplification on 2020-05-06SELECT @log_bet_category = 1WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(1,2);SELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(3);END;--IF @is_insert_needed = 1 -- insert accept / reject / counter offer   AND NOT(@is_reverse = 1 AND @i_log_bet_type = 1) -- Sell Undo already, no need to insert Accept record   AND NOT(@is_cancel_reverse = 1 AND @i_log_bet_type = 2 AND @log_bet_category = 6) -- Cancel Undo already, no need to insert Reject Cancel recordBEGIN-- special handling for ticket cancelIF @i_log_bet_type = 2 AND @log_bet_category = 6 -- Reject, CancelBEGINSELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_id   --,@centre_no = centre_no  --,@unit_bet = unit_bet   --,@financial_index = financial_index  ,@bizdate = sell_bizdate  ,@request_at = sell_datetime--,@flag = flag--,@remark = remark--,@reject_code = reject_code--,@reject_reason = reject_reasonFROM   @ticket;END;--SET @log_bet_type = @i_log_bet_type;INSERT INTO dbo.log_bet   (activity_id   ,system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,log_bet_type   ,log_bet_category   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,collation_sequence   ,account_no   ,account_category   ,channel_type   ,window_no   ,is_on_course   ,centre_no   ,unit_bet   ,financial_index   ,flag   ,remark   ,reject_code   ,reject_reason   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,checkpoint_id   ,activity_bizdate   ,activity_at   ,create_at   ,update_at)VALUES   (@activity_id   ,@system_id   ,@sell_request_id   ,@parent_sell_request_id   ,@log_bet_type   ,@log_bet_category   ,@ticket_id   ,@sports_id   ,@counter_offer_id   ,@collation_sequence   ,@account_no   ,@account_category   ,@channel_type   ,@window_no   ,@is_on_course   ,@centre_no   ,@unit_bet   ,@financial_index   ,@flag   ,@remark   ,@reject_code   ,@reject_reason   ,@activity_code   ,@activity_type   ,@message_type   ,@sell_request_status   ,@ticket_status   ,@counter_offer_type   ,@collation_type   ,@bet_intercept_reason   ,@checkpoint_id   ,@bizdate   ,@request_at   ,@now   ,@now);END;SET @i_log_bet_type+=1;END;END;

                       dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY-- ticket_location   ,@location ,@tvp_ticket_status                  dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_single          dbo.udt_ticket_bet_single READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_allup            dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@ticket_status     TINYINT = 2  ,@ticket_action     TINYINT = 1; -- sell ticketDECLARE    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;
