CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_sell(-- activity@tvp_activity                        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                        dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                             dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY-- ticket_location   ,@location                             dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY-- account    ,@account                               dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY-- ticket info   ,@tvp_ticket                                dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_status                  dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_single          dbo.udt_ticket_bet_single READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_allup            dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@ticket_status     TINYINT = 2  ,@ticket_action     TINYINT = 1; -- sell ticketDECLARE    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

(@st DATETIME, @ChannelID SMALLINT, @tempChannelID SMALLINT, @SiteID TINYINT, @TranMsgIDs TransMsgIDTableType READONLY)        INSERT INTO #work (TBAccountNo, Seqno, ServerID, ReplyTime, ChannelID, SentTime, Respms, TransMsgID)        SELECT             a.TBAccountNo,             a.Seqno,             a.ServerID,             a.TransTime,             a.ChannelID,             b.TransTime,             DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, b.TransTime, a.TransTime),            a.TransMsgID        FROM [logtrans_6] AS a         INNER JOIN @TranMsgIDs AS t ON a.TransMsgID = t.TransMsgID        INNER JOIN [logtrans_6] AS b             ON a.TBAccountNo = b.TBAccountNo             AND a.Seqno = b.Seqno             AND a.ServerID = b.ServerID             AND a.ChannelID = b.ChannelID            AND b.TransMsgID = a.TransMsgID - 1        WHERE a.TransTime >= b.TransTime             AND b.TransTime >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -30, @st)            AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, b.TransTime, a.TransTime) < 60 AND a.ChannelID IN (1,4)             AND a.ServerType IN (SELECT SiteID FROM [dbo].[sr_get_site_id_list](@tempChannelID, @SiteID))             AND b.ServerType IN (SELECT SiteID FROM [dbo].[sr_get_site_id_list](@tempChannelID, @SiteID))

(@st DATETIME, @ChannelID SMALLINT, @tempChannelID SMALLINT, @SiteID TINYINT, @TranMsgIDs TransMsgIDTableType READONLY)        INSERT INTO #work (TBAccountNo, Seqno, ServerID, ReplyTime, ChannelID, SentTime, Respms, TransMsgID)        SELECT             a.TBAccountNo,             a.Seqno,             a.ServerID,             a.TransTime,             a.ChannelID,             b.TransTime,             DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, b.TransTime, a.TransTime),            a.TransMsgID        FROM [logtrans_6] AS a         INNER JOIN @TranMsgIDs AS t ON a.TransMsgID = t.TransMsgID        INNER JOIN [logtrans_6] AS b             ON a.TBAccountNo = b.TBAccountNo             AND a.Seqno = b.Seqno             AND a.ServerID = b.ServerID             AND a.ChannelID = b.ChannelID            AND b.TransMsgID = a.TransMsgID - 1        WHERE a.TransTime >= b.TransTime             AND b.TransTime >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -30, @st)            AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE, b.TransTime, a.TransTime) < 60 AND a.ChannelID IN (1,4)             AND a.ServerType IN (SELECT SiteID FROM [dbo].[sr_get_site_id_list](@tempChannelID, @SiteID))             AND b.ServerType IN (SELECT SiteID FROM [dbo].[sr_get_site_id_list](@tempChannelID, @SiteID))
